results.rendered_html: smat ind. (prob. connected with prec.; accord. to  Sāy.  = sumat, q.v.) together, at the same time, at once (is a prep. with instr. = ‘together or along with’; often in comp. = ‘having’, ‘possessing’, ‘provided with’),  RV.
